facebook.caption:
7,215 reviews. 4.8 stars. For a pizza place in Phu Quoc.

The Home Pizza Trần Hưng Đạo on 129 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo isn't playing around. $15-30 a head, wood-fired crust, and a crowd every single night. This is the kind of spot that earns its rating one table at a time.

Go hungry. Go early. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the pizza come out of that oven at The Home Pizza Trần Hưng Đạo. 7,215 people rated this 4.8 stars and now you'll see why. $15-30 a head, Dương Đông, Phu Quoc. Tag your travel buddy.
